816,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3157,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":14759},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7247988263821263675","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"分虽然低，剧情虽然憋屈，但这不影响它是一部可以看下去的好作品。这虽然也是一个一部做大做强成为至高的作品，剧情也如很多烂俗小说一样一件接一件的套娃。但层层叠叠剧情各不相同跌宕起伏，至少不会看到无聊的地方（虽然虽然很多地方专门为了水字数）。如果你不是那种想看杀伐果断我一人为王众星捧月的剧情话，这部作品确实挺推荐无聊的时候看一看。顺便一提这作品虽然主角也有多女但感情戏基本没有。前期的女帝和男主完全互相利用，谁离开谁都会变成离水的鱼。男主是个矛盾的人但也是个简单的人。他想救大梁不假，但奈何队友全是猪，还有几头猪想着讨好屠夫好对方到时候不宰了自己的肉卖钱。这也是为什么后来主角想跑路的原因。但哪怕有点道德的人毕竟也是人。谁能在看到满城的人被屠宰殆尽后不想着继续拯救这个残破不堪的国家呢？（我打高分单纯因为这小说我看的下去，难得没看到那么一个“丧心病狂”类型的男主）","text_exts":[{"e":131,"s":127,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774073166927D84EF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227247988263821263675%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227152780640994200609%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687554207,"group_id":"7152780640994200609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"经典书籍《霸道总裁的俏皮老王》","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1SGPhf1/skQTbb/TPL/CyPVjP9Og9BbwfH8tdnzTmRl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2212664979753207","user_name":"土豆知道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2212664979753207","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7152780640994200609","book_info":{"abstract":"是谁改良了造纸术，传承了人类文明？
